backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profiles with subscription tiers, bot authentication, trade ledger, license management, access control via MixinAuthorization, and strategic vault storage with JWT-based authorization.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module with placeholder types and identity function for canister upgrade compatibility.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the requirement to replace unsafe Ed25519 key generation fallback in ConnectBotWizardModal.tsx with a cryptographically secure library or clear error message.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend components including authentication, dashboard screens, hooks for profiles/licenses/trades/admin, utilities for encoding/formatting, and Cupertino Quant design system with glassmorphism and emerald accents.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color tokens for light/dark themes, including charcoal backgrounds, emerald accents, and sidebar/chart color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tag, Smart Money Vault title, and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/index.ts: TypeScript type definition for SignalFetchResult discriminated union with ok/err variants for bot API responses.
frontend/PHASE1_BACKEND_IMPLEMENTATION_C: Comprehensive 189-step checklist for Phase 1 backend implementation covering documentation, type system extensions, data storage, signature verification, bot APIs, audit logging, admin dashboard, upgrade safety, and backward compatibility.
frontend/ROADMAP_BATCH_EXECUTION.md: Detailed execution plan for Phases 3–8 including Connect Wizard, Settings Page, Ed25519 key generation, bot registration, SaaS tiers, trading engine, Command Center UI, multi-bot architecture, and institutional hardening with immutable path constraints.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component managing authentication state, displaying minimalist landing page for unauthenticated users, and rendering AppShell with ProfileSetupModal for authenticated users without profiles.
frontend/src/components/analytics/Analyt: A drawer component that displays analytics events in two tabs (local and backend), showing event types with icons, colors, timestamps, and payload details in a scrollable list.
A simple button component with a bar chart icon that serves as the entry point to open the analytics drawer.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: An authentication button that toggles between sign-in and sign-out states using Internet Identity, with loading states and error handling for authentication flow.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: A modal dialog for new users to set up their profile with required display name and optional account identifier fields, saving to the backend on submission.
frontend/src/components/common/AccessDen: A centered screen component that displays an access denied message with conditional content based on authentication status and a sign-in button for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/components/common/LoadingSk: A collection of skeleton loading components (card, table, form, chart, page) that display animated placeholders while content is loading.
frontend/src/components/common/StateMess: A reusable component for displaying empty or error states with an icon, title, description, and optional action button.
frontend/src/components/common/ToastProv: A context provider and hook for displaying toast notifications (success, error, info) at the top center of the screen with auto-dismiss functionality.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/AuditL: A dashboard panel that displays a scrollable table of audit log entries showing timestamps, actions, and details with loading, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Dashbo: Navigation header component with tabs for dashboard, trades, overview, admin, and settings screens. Includes authentication, analytics entrypoint, tour launcher, and conditional admin access based on user permissions.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Equity: Displays an equity curve chart using Recharts with loading, error, and empty states. Fetches equity data via useGetEquityCurve hook and renders a composed chart with gradient area and line.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/LiveLo: Terminal-style log panel showing timestamped system messages with color-coded types (info, success, error). Includes periodic ping logs, uplink status monitoring, and a connectivity test button.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/LivePu: Duplicate of LiveLogsPanel with identical functionality: terminal-style log display, periodic ping logs, uplink status monitoring, and connectivity test button.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Perfor: Renders an area chart showing equity curve performance telemetry over time. Includes loading skeleton, error handling, and empty state for when no trade data exists.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/System: Displays system health metrics including bot online/offline status with animated indicator, license verification status, ICP cycles count, and last heartbeat timestamp. Shows cycles warning if present.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Uplink: Displays a card for controlling the trading bot's uplink status (EXECUTE/STANDBY) with a toggle switch and visual indicators. Handles loading, error states, and mutation feedback for toggling the bot on/off.
Main application shell that manages navigation between screens (dashboard, trades, admin, overview, settings, payment success/failure) with URL routing via hash/path. Includes header/footer rendering, analytics tracking, and onboarding tour provider.
frontend/src/components/settings/AdminTi: Admin panel displaying a table of subscription tiers with details like price, max bots, max API calls, features, and active status. Handles loading, error, and empty states with appropriate UI feedback.
frontend/src/components/settings/Connect: Panel for connecting a trading bot by displaying current connection status (public key and bot URL) and opening a wizard modal. Shows linked/configured status with visual indicators and a button to configure or reconfigure the bot.

Multi-step wizard modal for generating Ed25519 keypairs using Web Crypto API, revealing private keys for copying, linking public keys to the backend, and configuring bot HTTPS URLs. Includes validation, error handling, and step-by-step navigation.
frontend/src/components/settings/Profile: Form for editing user profile settings including display name, account ID, timezone selection, and notification preferences. Displays read-only principal ID and handles saving profile updates with loading states.
frontend/src/components/settings/StripeC: Modal component for configuring Stripe integration with secret key and allowed countries inputs, including validation and submission via useSetStripeConfiguration hook.
frontend/src/components/settings/Subscri: Displays subscription tier cards with features and pricing, handles Stripe checkout session creation, and includes onboarding tour integration for the settings screen.
frontend/src/components/tour/OnboardingT: Context provider for managing onboarding tour state (active, steps, completion) with localStorage persistence and dynamic step registration based on current screen and admin status.
frontend/src/components/tour/types.ts: TypeScript type definitions for tour steps (screen, target, placement) and tour state (active, current index, completed steps).
frontend/src/components/tour/useOnboardi: Re-exports the useOnboardingTour hook from OnboardingTourProvider for convenient access to tour context.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor instance with identity-based authentication, initializes access control with admin token, and invalidates dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: Provides hooks for admin operations including checking admin status, fetching all licenses, and creating/updating/revoking licenses with query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useAnalytics.ts: Manages local analytics events in localStorage with recording, storage, and clearing functionality for navigation, tour, and Stripe events.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditLedger.ts: Fetches audit log entries from the backend with configurable limit and 10-second auto-refresh interval.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackendAnalytics.t: Provides hooks to fetch analytics events from backend and store new analytics events with automatic query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUserProfile: Fetches and saves the current user's profile with actor availability checks and query cache invalidation on updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useEquityCurve.ts: Calculates equity curve data from user trades by computing running P&L from entry/exit prices and transforming into time-series points.
frontend/src/hooks/useFetchSignalsTest.t: Mutation hook for testing signal fetch connectivity, handles success/error responses with toast notifications and error normalization.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeartbeat.ts: React Query hook to fetch heartbeat data for a given account ID, with automatic 10-second refresh intervals.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout, managing identity state and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useLicense.ts: React Query hook to fetch the current user's license status from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useLinkBotPublicKey.t: Mutation hook to register a bot public key, invalidating related queries and showing toast notifications on success or error.
frontend/src/hooks/useLiveLogs.ts: React Query hook to fetch paginated trades for the current user's account, refreshing every 5 seconds for live updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetBotUrl.ts: Mutation hook to set bot URL with client-side HTTPS validation, invalidating bot profile queries and showing toast feedback.
frontend/src/hooks/useStripe.ts: Provides hooks for Stripe configuration, checkout session creation, and session status retrieval with React Query integration.
frontend/src/hooks/useTiers.ts: React Query hooks to list all subscription tiers or fetch a single tier by ID from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrades.ts: React Query hook to fetch paginated trades with optional account ID and time range filters.
frontend/src/hooks/useUplink.ts: Provides hooks to fetch bot profile and toggle uplink state (EXECUTE/STANDBY) with query invalidation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom Cupertino Quant dark theme using charcoal backgrounds, emerald accents, and glassmorphism utilities.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function combining clsx and tailwind-merge for conditional CSS class merging.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point wrapping the app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider contexts.
frontend/src/screens/AdminScreen.tsx: Admin panel screen for managing user licenses with create/update/revoke functionality, access control, and onboarding tour integration.
frontend/src/screens/DashboardScreen.tsx: Main dashboard screen displaying uplink controller, system heartbeat, live pulse terminal, performance telemetry, and audit ledger panels with tour step registration.
frontend/src/screens/OverviewScreen.tsx: Displays user license status and account information with tour integration. Shows license activation state, account ID, and timestamps with conditional rendering for missing data.
frontend/src/screens/PaymentFailureScree: Payment failure screen with analytics tracking. Provides options to retry payment or return to dashboard.
frontend/src/screens/PaymentSuccessScree: Payment success confirmation screen with analytics tracking. Shows success message and button to return to dashboard.
frontend/src/screens/SettingsRouteScreen: Empty file, likely a placeholder for settings routing logic.
frontend/src/screens/SettingsScreen.tsx: Tabbed settings interface with profile, bot connection, subscription, and admin tier management panels. Conditionally shows admin tab based on user permissions.
frontend/src/screens/TradesScreen.tsx: Paginated trade history screen with filtering by account ID and time range. Includes tour integration, table display with P&L calculations, and pagination controls.
frontend/src/utils/actorErrorMessage.ts: Normalizes and formats actor error messages into user-friendly strings. Detects specific error patterns like busy canister, network issues, and authorization failures.
frontend/src/utils/encoding.ts: Provides hex-to-bytes and bytes-to-hex conversion utilities for encoding operations.
frontend/src/utils/format.ts: Formatting utilities for timestamps and P&L calculations. Converts nanosecond timestamps to readable dates and calculates profit/loss based on trade side.
frontend/src/utils/tweetnaclSmokeTest.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder for TweetNaCl cryptography library testing.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: URL parameter parsing and session storage utilities for both hash-based and query string routing. Supports parameter persistence across navigation and cleanup from URL.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system with CSS variables, custom font families (Inter, JetBrains Mono), container settings, border radius variables, custom shadows, backdrop blur utilities, and animation keyframes for accordions and other UI elements.
project_state.json: Project state document tracking Smart Money Vault crypto trading platform architecture with 8 pending security fix requests including stable storage implementation, Ed25519 signature verification, encrypted Stripe keys, subscription mode changes, secure key generation, nonce cleanup, and webhook handling for the Internet Computer canister backend.
